verify_profiles.label: Worker layout check
commands: python -c "from pathlib import Path; required=['wrangler.toml','workspace/src/worker.js']; missing=[item for item in required if not Path(item).exists()]; raise SystemExit('missing required files: ' + ', '.join(missing) if missing else 0)"

verify_profiles.label: Desktop build probe
commands: python -c "from pathlib import Path; dist=Path('dist'); dist.mkdir(exist_ok=True); (dist / 'opengpt-desktop-probe.txt').write_text('desktop build probe\n', encoding='utf-8')"

verify_profiles.label: Desktop smoke probe
commands: python -c "from pathlib import Path; import sys; probe=Path('dist/opengpt-desktop-probe.txt'); print(probe.read_text(encoding='utf-8').strip() if probe.exists() else 'missing'); sys.exit(0 if probe.exists() else 1)"

build_commands: python -c "from pathlib import Path; dist=Path('dist'); dist.mkdir(exist_ok=True); (dist / 'opengpt-desktop-probe.txt').write_text('desktop build probe\n', encoding='utf-8')"
smoke_commands: python -c "from pathlib import Path; import sys; probe=Path('dist/opengpt-desktop-probe.txt'); print(probe.read_text(encoding='utf-8').strip() if probe.exists() else 'missing'); sys.exit(0 if probe.exists() else 1)"
